aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Gary P. Frank, Inc. due to insufficient conversational content and limited authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement structured FAQ schema to address common HVAC queries.
Expand content to include detailed how-to guides and problem-solving tips.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can benefit from more regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or installation processes.
LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and energy-efficient solutions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema and expanding service-related content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as a regional expert by publishing detailed case studies and industry insights.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the algorithms that power tomorrow's searches.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, 40% of potential leads are slipping through the cracks.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current content lacks the structured data and conversational tone needed for AI assistants to cite the business.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth: Your Path to HVAC Authority
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can enhance your AI visibility and capture more leads.
